grammar: be 動詞 (am / is / are)；I am… / You are…；主詞代名詞
intro_zh: 第一課我們學會用英語打招呼、介紹自己，並認識英語句子最重要的兩個基礎：「主詞代名詞」和「be 動詞 (am / is / are)」。學會這一課，你就能說出第一個完整的英語句子！
can_do: 能用 Hello / Hi 跟別人打招呼，用 Goodbye 道別。
能說出 I am… 介紹自己的名字。
能正確使用 am / is / are 三種 be 動詞。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Mia. I am a new student.
sentences.zh: 嗨！我是米亞。我是一個新學生。

sentences.en: Today is my first day at school.
sentences.zh: 今天是我在學校的第一天。

sentences.en: A boy says hello to me. He is Leo.
sentences.zh: 一個男孩跟我打招呼。他是里歐。

sentences.en: "Welcome! How are you?" he asks.
sentences.zh: 「歡迎！你好嗎？」他問。

sentences.en: "I am fine, thank you," I say.
sentences.zh: 「我很好，謝謝你，」我說。

sentences.en: Leo and I are happy. We are classmates now.
sentences.zh: 里歐和我都很開心。我們現在是同學了。

sentences.en: "This is Emma. She is my friend too," he says.
sentences.zh: 「這是艾瑪。她也是我的朋友，」他說。

sentences.en: Emma is very nice, and she can sing well.
sentences.zh: 艾瑪人很好，而且她很會唱歌。

sentences.en: "Can I play with you?" I ask. "Sure!" they say.
sentences.zh: 「我可以跟你們一起玩嗎？」我問。「當然！」他們說。

sentences.en: Now we are good friends. Goodbye, see you tomorrow!
sentences.zh: 現在我們是好朋友了。再見，明天見！

questions.q: Who is the new student?
Is Leo a boy or a girl?
Can Emma sing well?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 主詞代名詞 + be 動詞 (am / is / are)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 英文句子開頭的「主詞」常用代名詞代替人或物。be 動詞會跟著主詞改變：I 配 am；he / she / it 配 is；you / we / they 配 are。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 打招呼與問候 (Greetings)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 見面時用 Hello! 或 Hi! 打招呼；離開時說 Goodbye! 或 Bye!。問候對方用 How are you?，可以回答 I am fine, thank you.（我很好，謝謝你。）

examples.en: A: Hello! How are you?
B: I am fine, thank you. And you?
A: I am fine, too.

lines.en: Hi! I am Emma. What is your name?
lines.zh: 嗨！我是艾瑪。你叫什麼名字？

lines.en: Hello, Emma. I am Leo. Nice to meet you.
lines.zh: 哈囉，艾瑪。我是里歐。很高興認識你。

lines.en: Nice to meet you, too. We are classmates now!
lines.zh: 我也很高興認識你。我們現在是同學了！

lines.en: Yes! Goodbye, see you tomorrow.
lines.zh: 對！再見，明天見。

sentences.en: Hello! I am Anna.
sentences.zh: 哈囉！我是安娜。

sentences.en: This is my friend, Ben.
sentences.zh: 這是我的朋友，班。

sentences.en: He is a boy. She is a girl.
sentences.zh: 他是男孩。她是女孩。

sentences.en: We are happy today.
sentences.zh: 我們今天很開心。

sentences.en: Are you OK? Yes, I am fine.
sentences.zh: 你還好嗎？是的，我很好。

sentences.en: Thank you very much!
sentences.zh: 非常謝謝你！

sentences.en: I am sorry. — It is OK.
sentences.zh: 對不起。——沒關係。

sentences.en: Goodbye! See you later.
sentences.zh: 再見！待會見。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的 be 動詞 (am / is / are)
練習三：選出正確的代名詞

items.q: Anna is a girl. ___ is happy.
Tom and I are friends. ___ are happy.
Look at the cat. ___ is cute.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

grammar: How old are you? / How many…?；基數與序數
intro_zh: 第二課我們學會 1 到 100 的數字、怎麼問「你幾歲？」和「有多少？」。學會數字，你就能說年齡、數東西、買東西，這是生活裡每天都用得到的英語！
can_do: 能從 one 數到 twenty，並說出 thirty 到 hundred 的整十數。
能用 How old are you? 問年齡，並回答 I am … years old.
能用 How many…? 問數量，並用 first、second、third… 等序數排順序。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Leo. I am ten years old.
sentences.zh: 嗨！我是里歐。我十歲。

sentences.en: Tonight my family goes to the night market.
sentences.zh: 今晚我們全家去夜市。

sentences.en: "How many people are here?" I ask my mom.
sentences.zh: 「這裡有多少人？」我問媽媽。

sentences.en: "Too many to count!" she says with a smile.
sentences.zh: 「太多了，數不完！」她笑著說。

sentences.en: I buy a dozen dumplings, so that is twelve dumplings.
sentences.zh: 我買了一打水餃，也就是十二顆水餃。

sentences.en: My little sister Mia is only five years old.
sentences.zh: 我的小妹米雅才五歲。

sentences.en: She eats half of them and wants more.
sentences.zh: 她吃掉了一半，還想要更多。

sentences.en: At the game stall, I am the first to win a toy.
sentences.zh: 在遊戲攤位，我第一個贏到一個玩具。

sentences.en: Mia is second, and she gets some candy too.
sentences.zh: 米雅是第二個，她也拿到一些糖果。

sentences.en: We have many friends, but few nights are this happy!
sentences.zh: 我們有許多朋友，但很少有這麼開心的夜晚！

questions.q: How old is Leo?
How many dumplings does Leo buy?
Who is the first to win a toy?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 基數與序數 (Cardinal & Ordinal Numbers)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 「基數」用來數數量（one、two、three…）；「序數」用來排順序（first、second、third…）。大部分序數是在基數後加 -th，但 first、second、third 要特別記。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② How old are you? 與 How many…?
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問年齡用 How old are you?，回答 I am … years old.（我…歲）。問數量用 How many + 複數名詞…?，回答可以用數字加上 some（一些）、many（許多）、few（很少）。

examples.en: A: How old are you? B: I am ten years old.
A: How many books? B: I have twelve books.
examples.zh: A：有幾本書？B：我有十二本書。

examples.en: I have some dogs, but few cats.
examples.zh: 我有一些狗，但只有很少的貓。

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：在生日派對上

lines.en: Happy birthday, Tom! How old are you now?
lines.zh: 生日快樂，湯姆！你現在幾歲？

lines.en: Thank you! I am ten years old today.
lines.zh: 謝謝你！我今天十歲了。

lines.en: Wow! How many friends are here?
lines.zh: 哇！有多少個朋友在這裡？

lines.en: Count with me. One, two, three… twelve friends!
lines.zh: 跟我一起數。一、二、三…十二個朋友！

lines.en: You are the first to cut the cake. I am second!
lines.zh: 你第一個切蛋糕。我是第二個！

sentences.en: Let me count: one, two, three, four, five.
sentences.zh: 讓我數一數：一、二、三、四、五。

sentences.en: I am eleven years old.
sentences.zh: 我十一歲。

sentences.en: How many cats do you have?
sentences.zh: 你有幾隻貓？

sentences.en: I have ten fingers and two hands.
sentences.zh: 我有十根手指和兩隻手。

sentences.en: A dozen eggs is twelve eggs.
sentences.zh: 一打蛋是十二顆蛋。

sentences.en: She is first, and he is last.
sentences.zh: 她是第一個，他是最後一個。

sentences.en: I have some apples, but few oranges.
sentences.zh: 我有一些蘋果，但只有很少的橘子。

sentences.en: Half of ten is five.
sentences.zh: 十的一半是五。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格
練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: Which is an ordinal number? (哪一個是序數？)
How ____ are you? — I am nine.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: How many dogs do you have?

items.q: 他是第一個，我是第二個。
items.ans: He is first, and I am second.

grammar: What color is it? It's…；What shape…
intro_zh: 第三課我們學會用英語說出各種顏色和形狀。學會問「What color is it?」（它是什麼顏色？）和「What shape is it?」（它是什麼形狀？），你就能描述身邊的東西，讓你的世界變得色彩繽紛！
can_do: 能說出十二種常見的顏色（紅、藍、黃、綠…）。
能用 What color is it? 問顏色，並用 It's… 回答。
能說出圓形、正方形、三角形等基本形狀，並用 What shape is it? 發問。

sentences.en: Leo has a big box at home.
sentences.zh: 里歐家裡有一個大箱子。

sentences.en: The box is brown, and it is round.
sentences.zh: 這個箱子是棕色的，而且它是圓的。

sentences.en: "What color is it?" asks Mia. "It's brown," says Leo.
sentences.zh: 「它是什麼顏色？」蜜亞問。「它是棕色的，」里歐說。

sentences.en: Inside the box, there are many small shapes.
sentences.zh: 箱子裡面有許多小形狀。

sentences.en: Each shape has a different color.
sentences.zh: 每個形狀都有不同的顏色。

sentences.en: He has a red square, a blue triangle, and a yellow star.
sentences.zh: 他有一個紅色正方形、一個藍色三角形和一個黃色星形。

sentences.en: "What shape is the green one?" asks Mia. "It's a circle," says Leo.
sentences.zh: 「綠色的那個是什麼形狀？」蜜亞問。「它是一個圓圈，」里歐說。

sentences.en: Most of the shapes are big, but a few are very small.
sentences.zh: 大部分的形狀很大，但有一些非常小。

sentences.en: The colorful box makes Leo and Mia happy.
sentences.zh: 這個色彩繽紛的箱子讓里歐和蜜亞很開心。

questions.q: What color is Leo's box?
What shape is the green one?
How many stars does Leo have, and what color is it?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 問顏色：What color is it? — It's…
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想知道一個東西是什麼顏色，用「What color is it?」來問。回答時用「It's + 顏色」，It's 是 It is 的縮寫。
table: What color is it? It's red.
它是什麼顏色？它是紅色的。
What color is it? It's blue.
它是什麼顏色？它是藍色的。
What color is it? It's green.
它是什麼顏色？它是綠色的。
What color is it? It's pink.
它是什麼顏色？它是粉紅色的。
What color is it? It's black.
它是什麼顏色？它是黑色的。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 問形狀：What shape is it? — It's a…
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想知道一個東西是什麼形狀，用「What shape is it?」來問。回答時形狀前面要加 a：It's a circle.（它是一個圓圈。）也可以用形容詞 round（圓的）、big（大的）、small（小的）來描述。

examples.en: What shape is it? It's a circle. It's round.
examples.zh: 它是什麼形狀？它是一個圓圈。它是圓的。

examples.en: What shape is it? It's a square.
examples.zh: 它是什麼形狀？它是一個正方形。

examples.en: It's a big star. It's a small triangle.
examples.zh: 它是一顆大星星。它是一個小三角形。

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：在文具店看貼紙

lines.en: Look! I have a box of stickers. They are colorful!
lines.zh: 你看！我有一盒貼紙。它們色彩繽紛！

lines.en: Wow! What color is this star?
lines.zh: 哇！這顆星星是什麼顏色？

lines.en: It's gold. And this one is a pink circle.
lines.zh: 它是金色的。而這一個是粉紅色的圓圈。

lines.en: What shape is the blue one?
lines.zh: 藍色的那個是什麼形狀？

lines.en: It's a square. I have a few for you. Each one is for you!
lines.zh: 它是一個正方形。我有一些要給你。每一個都給你！

sentences.en: What color is it? It's yellow.
sentences.zh: 它是什麼顏色？它是黃色的。

sentences.en: The sky is blue, and the grass is green.
sentences.zh: 天空是藍色的，草是綠色的。

sentences.en: What shape is it? It's a circle. It's round.
sentences.zh: 它是什麼形狀？它是一個圓圈。它是圓的。

sentences.en: I have a big red box and a small white box.
sentences.zh: 我有一個大紅箱子和一個小白箱子。

sentences.en: A triangle has three lines.
sentences.zh: 三角形有三條線。

sentences.en: Most stars are gold or yellow.
sentences.zh: 大部分的星星是金色或黃色的。

sentences.en: Each shape is a different color.
sentences.zh: 每個形狀都是不同的顏色。

sentences.en: This package is brown, and it is very big.
sentences.zh: 這個包裹是棕色的，而且它很大。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: What shape is it? It's a ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: What color is the sky? It's ____.
It has four lines. It's a ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.q: 它是什麼顏色？它是黃色的。
items.ans: What color is it? It's yellow.
I have a big red box.

grammar: I have… / He has…；身體動作動詞
intro_zh: 第四課我們學會用英語說出身體的各個部位，從頭到腳一起認識！同時學會兩個超好用的句型：「I have…（我有…）」和「He has…（他有…）」，還有許多跟身體有關的動作動詞，例如看、聽、走、坐。學會這一課，你就能描述自己和別人的身體囉！
can_do: 能說出頭、眼睛、手、腳等常見的身體部位英文。
能用 I have… 和 He has… 描述自己和別人有什麼。
能用 see / hear / walk / sit 等動作動詞造簡單的句子。

sentences.en: On Sunday, Leo and Mia walk to the zoo with Mom.
sentences.zh: 星期日，里歐和米雅跟媽媽一起走路去動物園。

sentences.en: "Look! I see a big elephant," says Leo.
sentences.zh: 「看！我看見一隻大象，」里歐說。

sentences.en: The elephant has a long nose and two big ears.
sentences.zh: 這隻大象有一個長鼻子和兩隻大耳朵。

sentences.en: It has four legs and a fat body, too.
sentences.zh: 牠也有四條腿和一個胖胖的身體。

sentences.en: Mia points and laughs, "The monkey has small hands and ten fingers!"
sentences.zh: 米雅指著並笑著說：「那隻猴子有小小的手和十根手指！」

sentences.en: "I have two hands, too," says Leo, and he holds Mom's hand.
sentences.zh: 「我也有兩隻手，」里歐說，然後他握住媽媽的手。

sentences.en: They hear a lion. It has a loud voice and big teeth.
sentences.zh: 他們聽見一隻獅子。牠有很大的聲音和大大的牙齒。

sentences.en: Mom says, "Please sit down. We can eat and look at the birds."
sentences.zh: 媽媽說：「請坐下來。我們可以一邊吃，一邊看小鳥。」

sentences.en: Leo nods his head and smiles with a happy mouth.
sentences.zh: 里歐點點頭，用開心的嘴巴微笑。

sentences.en: "I love the zoo!" he says, and they walk home.
sentences.zh: 「我愛動物園！」他說，然後他們走路回家。

questions.q: How does the elephant's nose look?
What does the monkey have?
What does Leo do with his head?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① have 與 has（我有… / 他有…）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想說「有」的時候用動詞 have。主詞是 I / you / we / they 時用 have；主詞是 he / she / it 時要變成 has。後面接身體部位或東西。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 身體動作動詞 (Body-action verbs)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 我們用身體做很多動作。用眼睛 see（看見）、用耳朵 hear（聽見）、用嘴巴 say（說）、用腳 walk（走路），用手 hold（握住）和 touch（觸碰）。

examples.en: I see with my eyes.
I hear with my ears.
We walk with our legs.

lines.en: Look at me! I have a big smile.
lines.zh: 看我！我有大大的微笑。

lines.en: I see! You have two big eyes, too.
lines.zh: 我看到了！你也有兩隻大眼睛。

lines.en: My dog has a small nose. Can you see it?
lines.zh: 我的狗有一個小鼻子。你看得到嗎？

lines.en: Yes! He has long ears. I like him.
lines.zh: 看得到！牠有長長的耳朵。我喜歡牠。

lines.en: Let's walk and play now!
lines.zh: 我們現在去走走玩耍吧！

sentences.en: I have a head, two arms, and two legs.
sentences.zh: 我有一個頭、兩隻手臂和兩條腿。

sentences.en: She has long hair and a small nose.
sentences.zh: 她有長頭髮和一個小鼻子。

sentences.en: We see with our eyes and hear with our ears.
sentences.zh: 我們用眼睛看，用耳朵聽。

sentences.en: He has ten fingers on his hands.
sentences.zh: 他的手上有十根手指。

sentences.en: I brush my teeth and smile.
sentences.zh: 我刷牙然後微笑。

sentences.en: Please sit down and listen to me.
sentences.zh: 請坐下來聽我說。

sentences.en: The baby can walk and laugh now.
sentences.zh: 這個寶寶現在會走路和笑了。

sentences.en: Touch your nose and nod your head!
sentences.zh: 摸摸你的鼻子，點點你的頭！

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案 (have / has) 填入空格
練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: We ____ with our legs and feet.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: Please sit down and listen to me.

grammar: This is my…；所有格 my / your / his / her
intro_zh: 第五課我們學會介紹自己的家人和朋友。學會用「This is my…」介紹身邊的人，並認識「所有格 my / your / his / her」怎麼說「我的、你的、他的、她的」。下次有人問起你的家人，你就能用英語驕傲地介紹他們！
can_do: 能用 This is my… 介紹家人和朋友。
能正確使用所有格 my / your / his / her。
能說出家庭成員（father / mother / brother / sister…）的英文。

sentences.en: Hi! My name is Leo. This is my family.
sentences.zh: 嗨！我的名字叫里歐。這是我的家庭。

sentences.en: This is my father. He is a kind man.
sentences.zh: 這是我的爸爸。他是一個親切的男人。

sentences.en: This is my mother. She is a wonderful woman.
sentences.zh: 這是我的媽媽。她是一個很棒的女人。

sentences.en: My father and my mother are my parents. They care about me.
sentences.zh: 我的爸爸和我的媽媽是我的父母。他們很關心我。

sentences.en: I have one brother and one sister.
sentences.zh: 我有一個弟弟和一個姊姊。

sentences.en: My sister is a teenager, but my baby brother is only one year old.
sentences.zh: 我的姊姊是青少年，但我的嬰兒弟弟才一歲。

sentences.en: My grandfather and grandmother live with us, and they are important to me.
sentences.zh: 我的爺爺和奶奶和我們住在一起，他們對我很重要。

sentences.en: This is my friend Ben. His father is my uncle, so Ben is my cousin too!
sentences.zh: 這是我的朋友班。他的爸爸是我的叔叔，所以班也是我的表兄弟！

sentences.en: Ben is a happy boy, and we are classmates at school.
sentences.zh: 班是一個快樂的男孩，我們是學校的同班同學。

sentences.en: I love my family and my friends. They are wonderful people.
sentences.zh: 我愛我的家庭和我的朋友。他們是很棒的人。

questions.q: What is the boy's name?
How old is Leo's baby brother?
Who is Leo's cousin?
questions.ans: His friend Ben is his cousin.

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 所有格 my / your / his / her（我的／你的／他的／她的）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 所有格放在名詞前面，表示「誰的」。my 是我的，your 是你的，his 是他的，her 是她的。要記得：用 his 還是 her，看的是「擁有者」的性別，不是後面那個東西。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② This is my…（介紹某個人）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 介紹身邊的一個人時，用「This is + 所有格 + 人」。介紹完可以再加一句描述他的話。

examples.en: This is my mother. She is wonderful.
This is my friend. His name is Ben.
examples.zh: 這是我的朋友。他的名字叫班。

examples.en: This is my baby sister. She is new!
examples.zh: 這是我剛出生的妹妹。她是新成員！

lines.en: Look, Tom! This is my family.
lines.zh: 你看，湯姆！這是我的家庭。

lines.en: Wonderful! Who is this man?
lines.zh: 很棒耶！這個男人是誰？

lines.en: This is my father. And this is my mother.
lines.zh: 這是我的爸爸。這是我的媽媽。

lines.en: Is this your brother? He is a baby!
lines.zh: 這是你的弟弟嗎？他是個嬰兒！

lines.en: Yes! His name is Leo. My family is important to me.
lines.zh: 對！他的名字叫里歐。我的家庭對我很重要。

sentences.en: This is my family.
sentences.zh: 這是我的家庭。

sentences.en: My father and mother are my parents.
sentences.zh: 我的爸爸和媽媽是我的父母親。

sentences.en: Her brother is a boy. His sister is a girl.
sentences.zh: 她的弟弟是男孩。他的姊姊是女孩。

sentences.en: This is my uncle. That is my aunt.
sentences.zh: 這是我的叔叔。那是我的阿姨。

sentences.en: Your cousin is my new friend.
sentences.zh: 你的表兄弟是我的新朋友。

sentences.en: The baby is one year old.
sentences.zh: 這個嬰兒一歲了。

sentences.en: My grandmother and grandfather care about me.
sentences.zh: 我的奶奶和爺爺很關心我。

sentences.en: My family is wonderful and important.
sentences.zh: 我的家庭很棒，也很重要。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的所有格 (my / your / his / her)

items.q: Ben is a boy. ____ mother is kind. (他的)

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: My father and mother are my ____.
A baby boy is my mother's ____.
My uncle and ____ are kind people.
This is my friend. ____ is a girl.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

grammar: There is / There are…；複數名詞
intro_zh: 第六課我們走進動物園、農場和家裡，認識各種可愛的動物與寵物！我們要學會用 There is（有一隻）和 There are（有很多隻）來說「某個地方有什麼動物」，還要學會把名詞變成「複數」（一隻變很多隻）。
can_do: 能說出常見的動物與寵物名稱（cat, dog, lion, panda…）。
能用 There is / There are 描述某地有什麼動物。
能把單數名詞變成複數（dog → dogs, fox → foxes）。

sentences.en: Today Leo and Mia go to a big farm.
sentences.zh: 今天里歐和米雅去一座大農場。

sentences.en: There are many animals on the farm.
sentences.zh: 農場上有很多動物。

sentences.en: There is one fat pig in the mud, and it is very happy.
sentences.zh: 泥巴裡有一隻胖胖的豬，牠非常開心。

sentences.en: There are four cows and two goats near the gate.
sentences.zh: 大門旁邊有四頭母牛和兩隻山羊。

sentences.en: There is a brown horse, and Mia gives it some grass.
sentences.zh: 有一匹棕色的馬，米雅給牠一些草。

sentences.en: There are five ducks and a white hen by the water.
sentences.zh: 水邊有五隻鴨子和一隻白色的母雞。

sentences.en: The hen has six small chicks, and they say "peep, peep."
sentences.zh: 母雞有六隻小雞，牠們發出「啾、啾」的聲音。

sentences.en: There are two rabbits and a cat under the tree.
sentences.zh: 樹下有兩隻兔子和一隻貓。

sentences.en: Leo's dog runs after the sheep, but the sheep are not afraid.
sentences.zh: 里歐的狗去追綿羊，但是綿羊一點都不怕。

sentences.en: Leo and Mia love the farm, and they want to come again!
sentences.zh: 里歐和米雅愛這座農場，他們想要再來一次！

questions.q: How many cows are there on the farm?
What does Mia give to the horse?
Where are the two rabbits and the cat?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① There is / There are（有……）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 要說某個地方「有」某樣東西，用 There is 加單數（一個）；用 There are 加複數（兩個以上）。記住：is 配「一隻」，are 配「很多隻」。
table: There are six cows on the farm.

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 名詞變複數（一個 → 很多個）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 多數名詞加 -s；字尾是 x, s, sh, ch 的加 -es；少數動物是「不規則複數」要特別記。

examples.en: one dog → two dogs
one fox → two foxes
examples.zh: 一隻狐狸 → 兩隻狐狸（加 -es）

examples.en: one mouse → two mice
examples.zh: 一隻老鼠 → 兩隻老鼠（不規則）

examples.en: one sheep → two sheep
examples.zh: 一隻綿羊 → 兩隻綿羊（單複數相同）

lines.en: Look! There is a big elephant.
lines.zh: 你看！有一隻大象。

lines.en: Wow! And there are two pandas over there.
lines.zh: 哇！那邊還有兩隻貓熊。

lines.en: I love the lions and tigers. They are so cool!
lines.zh: 我愛獅子和老虎。牠們好酷！

lines.en: Is there a penguin here?
lines.zh: 這裡有企鵝嗎？

lines.en: Yes! There are many penguins by the water.
lines.zh: 有！水邊有很多企鵝。

sentences.en: There is a dog in my home.
sentences.zh: 我家有一隻狗。

sentences.en: There are three cats on the bed.
sentences.zh: 床上有三隻貓。

sentences.en: There is a big bear in the forest.
sentences.zh: 森林裡有一隻大熊。

sentences.en: There are many fish in the sea.
sentences.zh: 海裡有很多魚。

sentences.en: There is a monkey in the tree.
sentences.zh: 樹上有一隻猴子。

sentences.en: There are two rabbits and a duck on the farm.
sentences.zh: 農場上有兩隻兔子和一隻鴨子。

sentences.en: Is there a snake here? No, there is not.
sentences.zh: 這裡有蛇嗎？沒有。

sentences.en: I have a pet bird. It is a parrot.
sentences.zh: 我有一隻寵物鳥。牠是一隻鸚鵡。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案 (is / are) 填入空格

items.q: There ____ a cat on the bed.
There ____ two dogs in my home.
There ____ many fish in the sea.
There ____ an owl in the tree.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的複數
練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: There are many sheep on the farm.

grammar: I like… / Do you like…?；可數與不可數
intro_zh: 這一課我們學會用英語談「吃」這件大事！從早餐、午餐到晚餐，從漢堡、披薩到冰淇淋，你會學到用 I like…（我喜歡⋯）說出自己愛吃的食物，再用 Do you like…?（你喜歡⋯嗎？）問問朋友。我們也會認識英文名詞分成「可數」和「不可數」兩種，點餐和聊三餐就難不倒你了！
can_do: 能用 I like… / I don't like… 說出自己喜歡或不喜歡的食物。
能用 Do you like…? 詢問別人喜不喜歡某種食物，並回答 Yes / No。
能分辨可數名詞（a hamburger）與不可數名詞（rice），正確使用 a / some。

sentences.en: It is six o'clock. Emma is very hungry.
sentences.zh: 現在六點了。艾瑪非常餓。

sentences.en: Her mom can cook a delicious dinner for the family.
sentences.zh: 她媽媽會為全家煮一頓美味的晚餐。

sentences.en: Tonight they eat rice, some soup, and fresh vegetables.
sentences.zh: 今晚他們吃米飯、一些湯和新鮮的蔬菜。

sentences.en: "I like chicken and beef," says Emma. "But I don't like pork."
sentences.zh: 「我喜歡雞肉和牛肉，」艾瑪說。「但是我不喜歡豬肉。」

sentences.en: "Do you like the soup, Leo?" asks Mom.
sentences.zh: 「里歐，你喜歡這湯嗎？」媽媽問。

sentences.en: "Yes, I do! It is not too hot, and it tastes sweet," says Leo.
sentences.zh: 「是的，我喜歡！它不會太燙，而且嚐起來很甜，」里歐說。

sentences.en: Dad eats an egg and some bread with butter.
sentences.zh: 爸爸吃一顆雞蛋和一些塗了奶油的麵包。

sentences.en: After dinner, they all eat a small cake for a snack.
sentences.zh: 晚餐後，他們都吃一小塊蛋糕當點心。

sentences.en: Now everyone is full. "Thank you, Mom! The meal is so delicious!"
sentences.zh: 現在大家都吃飽了。「謝謝媽媽！這一餐好美味！」

questions.q: Who can cook the dinner?
Does Emma like pork?
What do they eat for a snack after dinner?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① I like… / Do you like…？（喜好的問與答）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 用 I like + 食物 來說自己喜歡什麼；不喜歡用 I don't like。要問別人時，把 Do 放句首：Do you like…?；回答用 Yes, I do. 或 No, I don't.。
table: Yes, I do. I like rice.
No, I don't. I like noodles.

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 可數名詞與不可數名詞 (Countable & Uncountable)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 可以一個一個數的東西是「可數名詞」，單數前面加 a：a hamburger、an egg。像水、糖、肉這種無法一個一個數的是「不可數名詞」，不加 a，要說多一點就用 some：some rice、some sugar。

examples.en: I want a hamburger and an egg.
examples.zh: 我要一個漢堡和一顆雞蛋。

examples.en: Please give me some rice and some soup.
examples.zh: 請給我一些米飯和一些湯。

examples.en: I eat a cookie and some bread.
examples.zh: 我吃一片餅乾和一些麵包。

lines.en: I am so hungry. Do you like pizza, Tom?
lines.zh: 我好餓。湯姆，你喜歡披薩嗎？

lines.en: No, I don't. I like a hamburger and some fries. Do you like steak?
lines.zh: 不，我不喜歡。我喜歡漢堡和一些薯條。你喜歡牛排嗎？

lines.en: Yes, I do! I like steak and salad. Let's order now.
lines.zh: 是的，我喜歡！我喜歡牛排和沙拉。我們現在來點餐吧。

lines.en: Good idea. The food here is fresh and delicious!
lines.zh: 好主意。這裡的食物又新鮮又美味！

lines.en: Yummy! I am full now. Thank you.
lines.zh: 好吃！我現在吃飽了。謝謝你。

sentences.en: I am hungry. Let's eat breakfast.
sentences.zh: 我餓了。我們來吃早餐吧。

sentences.en: I like rice, but I don't like noodles.
sentences.zh: 我喜歡米飯，但是我不喜歡麵條。

sentences.en: Do you like ice cream? Yes, I do!
sentences.zh: 你喜歡冰淇淋嗎？是的，我喜歡！

sentences.en: My mom can cook a delicious dinner.
sentences.zh: 我媽媽會煮一頓美味的晚餐。

sentences.en: Please give me a sandwich and some soup.
sentences.zh: 請給我一個三明治和一些湯。

sentences.en: The cake is sweet, and the salad is fresh.
sentences.zh: 蛋糕很甜，沙拉很新鮮。

sentences.en: I am thirsty. The soup is too hot.
sentences.zh: 我口渴了。這湯太燙了。

sentences.en: Taste this pie. It is so delicious!
sentences.zh: 嚐嚐這個派。它好好吃！

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: Do you like soup? No, I ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: I am ____. I want some water.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.q: 我餓了。我們來吃晚餐吧。
items.ans: I am hungry. Let's eat dinner.

grammar: Would you like…?；How much…?
intro_zh: 第八課我們一起逛夜市！學會用英語點飲料、買水果、吃台灣小吃。最重要的是學會兩個超實用句型：禮貌地問別人「要不要？」的 Would you like…?，還有問價錢的 How much…?。學會這一課，你在夜市就能用英語點餐、付錢囉！
can_do: 能用 Would you like…? 禮貌地問別人要不要某樣東西，並回答 Yes / No。
能用 How much…? 問價錢，並聽懂價格的回答。
能說出常見的飲料、水果與台灣夜市小吃的英文。

reading.title_en: A Night at the Night Market

sentences.en: On Friday, Mom takes Emma and Leo to the night market.
sentences.zh: 星期五，媽媽帶艾瑪和里歐去逛夜市。

sentences.en: Wow, so many Taiwanese snacks and drinks are here!
sentences.zh: 哇，這裡有好多台灣小吃和飲料！

sentences.en: "Would you like some oyster omelet?" Mom asks.
sentences.zh: 「你們要不要來點蚵仔煎？」媽媽問。

sentences.en: "Yes, please!" says Leo. "How much is it?"
sentences.zh: 「好啊，麻煩你！」里歐說。「多少錢呢？」

sentences.en: "It is sixty dollars," the vendor says.
sentences.zh: 「六十元。」小販說。

sentences.en: Emma is thirsty, so she would like a pearl milk tea.
sentences.zh: 艾瑪口渴了，所以她想要一杯珍珠奶茶。

sentences.en: "How much are the strawberries and the mango?" Mom asks.
sentences.zh: 「草莓和芒果多少錢？」媽媽問。

sentences.en: "They are forty dollars," says the fruit vendor.
sentences.zh: 「四十元。」水果攤老闆說。

sentences.en: They eat stinky tofu with chopsticks and a small bowl.
sentences.zh: 他們用筷子和一個小碗吃臭豆腐。

sentences.en: Then they put the garbage in the trash can and go home happy.
sentences.zh: 然後他們把垃圾丟進垃圾桶，開心地回家。

questions.q: Where does Mom take Emma and Leo?
How much is the oyster omelet?
What would Emma like to drink?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① Would you like…?（你要不要…？／你想要…嗎？）
grammar_points.explain_zh: Would you like…? 是很有禮貌地問別人「要不要某樣東西」。後面接名詞（some tea、a drink），可回答 Yes, please.（好，麻煩你。）或 No, thank you.（不用了，謝謝。）。要說自己想要時，用 I would like… 或縮寫 I'd like…。
table: I would like a pearl milk tea.

grammar_points.title_zh: ② How much…?（…多少錢？）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問價錢用 How much is…?（單數）或 How much are…?（複數）。也可以簡單說 How much?（多少錢？）。回答時用價格，例如 It is fifty dollars.（五十元。）。

examples.en: How much is the fried chicken?
How much are the apples?
It is forty dollars.

lines.en: Wow, so many Taiwanese snacks! Would you like some oyster omelet?
lines.zh: 哇，好多台灣小吃！你要不要來點蚵仔煎？

lines.en: Yes, please! And I would like a pearl milk tea, too.
lines.zh: 好啊，麻煩你！我還想要一杯珍珠奶茶。

lines.en: Good. How much is the oyster omelet?
lines.zh: 好。蚵仔煎多少錢？

lines.en: It is sixty dollars. Would you like some stinky tofu?
lines.zh: 六十元。你要不要來點臭豆腐？

lines.en: No, thank you. The pearl milk tea is enough!
lines.zh: 不用了，謝謝。珍珠奶茶就夠了！

sentences.en: Would you like some water?
sentences.zh: 你要不要喝點水？

sentences.en: Yes, please. I am thirsty.
sentences.zh: 好的，麻煩你。我口渴了。

sentences.en: I would like a cup of coffee.
sentences.zh: 我想要一杯咖啡。

sentences.en: How much is the beef noodle?
sentences.zh: 牛肉麵多少錢？

sentences.en: The fried chicken is forty dollars.
sentences.zh: 炸雞排四十元。

sentences.en: Would you like an apple or a banana?
sentences.zh: 你要蘋果還是香蕉？

sentences.en: I'd like some soy milk and a fried bread stick.
sentences.zh: 我想要一杯豆漿和一根油條。

sentences.en: Please put the garbage in the bowl.
sentences.zh: 請把垃圾放進碗裡。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: I would like a ____ of milk.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: I cut the apple with a ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: How much is the pearl milk tea?
I would like a cup of coffee.

grammar: There is / are in the classroom；介系詞 in / on / under
intro_zh: 第九課我們走進教室，學會用英語說出教室裡有什麼東西。重點是「There is／There are」（有……）以及三個位置介系詞 in（在……裡面）、on（在……上面）、under（在……下面）。學會這一課，你就能描述自己的書包、桌子和整間教室！
can_do: 能用 There is / There are 說出教室裡有什麼。
能用 in / on / under 說出東西放在哪裡。
能說出黑板、粉筆、鉛筆、字典等學校用品的英文。

sentences.en: Leo is a student at an elementary school.
sentences.zh: 里歐是一所小學的學生。

sentences.en: There are many students in his class.
sentences.zh: 他的班上有很多學生。

sentences.en: There is a big blackboard in the classroom.
sentences.zh: 教室裡有一塊大黑板。

sentences.en: The teacher writes English words on the blackboard with chalk.
sentences.zh: 老師用粉筆在黑板上寫英文單字。

sentences.en: Leo has a pencil, a pen, and a ruler in his pencil case.
sentences.zh: 里歐的鉛筆盒裡有一枝鉛筆、一枝原子筆和一把尺。

sentences.en: His dictionary and notebook are on the table.
sentences.zh: 他的字典和筆記本在桌上。

sentences.en: His workbook is under the chair.
sentences.zh: 他的習作本在椅子下面。

sentences.en: In the English lesson, the students read, write, and learn new words.
sentences.zh: 在英文課裡，學生們閱讀、書寫並學習新單字。

sentences.en: When the bell rings, they go to the playground to play.
sentences.zh: 鐘聲響起時，他們就到操場去玩。

sentences.en: Leo loves school because he learns a lot every day.
sentences.zh: 里歐喜歡上學，因為他每天都學到很多東西。

questions.q: What is on the blackboard?
Where is Leo's workbook?
Where do the students go when the bell rings?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① There is / There are（有……）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 要說「（某處）有某樣東西」時，用 There is 接一個東西（單數），用 There are 接很多東西（複數）。問句把 is／are 放到 There 前面：Is there…? / Are there…?。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 介系詞 in / on / under（在裡面／上面／下面）
grammar_points.explain_zh: in 表示「在……裡面」，on 表示「在……上面（接觸）」，under 表示「在……下面」。這三個字幫我們說出東西的位置。

examples.en: The pen is in the pencil case.
The book is on the table.
The bag is under the chair.

lines.en: Leo, is there an eraser on your table?
lines.zh: 里歐，你桌上有橡皮擦嗎？

lines.en: No, there is no eraser on my table. It is in my workbook.
lines.zh: 沒有，我桌上沒有橡皮擦。它在我的習作本裡面。

lines.en: I see. Are there pencils in your pencil case?
lines.zh: 我知道了。你的鉛筆盒裡有鉛筆嗎？

lines.en: Yes, there are two pencils and a ruler.
lines.zh: 有的，有兩枝鉛筆和一把尺。

lines.en: Thank you! Now I can do my homework.
lines.zh: 謝謝你！現在我可以做我的家庭作業了。

sentences.en: There is a blackboard in the classroom.
sentences.zh: 教室裡有一塊黑板。

sentences.en: There are many students in my class.
sentences.zh: 我的班上有很多學生。

sentences.en: The chalk is on the blackboard.
sentences.zh: 粉筆在黑板上。

sentences.en: My pencil and pen are in my pencil case.
sentences.zh: 我的鉛筆和原子筆在鉛筆盒裡。

sentences.en: The dictionary is under my notebook.
sentences.zh: 字典在我的筆記本下面。

sentences.en: Is there a ruler on the table?
sentences.zh: 桌上有一把尺嗎？

sentences.en: The teacher writes a sentence on the blackboard.
sentences.zh: 老師在黑板上寫一個句子。

sentences.en: We study English and math at school.
sentences.zh: 我們在學校研讀英文和數學。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格（There is / There are / in / on / under）

items.q: There ____ a blackboard in the classroom.
There ____ many students in my class.
My pen is ____ the pencil case.
____ there a ruler on your table?

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: The teacher writes with ____ on the blackboard.
I write the answer in my ____.
I look up a word in the ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: is / The / book / on / table / the / .
items.ans: The book is on the table.

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: There is a blackboard in the classroom.
There are many students in the class.
The dictionary is on the table.
The pencil is in the bag.

grammar: 祈使句 (Open your book!)；Let's…
intro_zh: 上課時，老師常常會說「打開書本！」「不要作弊！」「我們一起開始吧！」這些句子叫做「祈使句」，用來叫別人做或不要做某件事。學會這一課，你就能聽懂課堂用語，也能用英語提出邀請、提醒同學！
can_do: 能用祈使句叫別人做某事，例如 Open your book!（打開書本！）。
能用 Don't… 叫別人不要做某事，例如 Don't cheat!（不要作弊！）。
能用 Let's… 邀請大家一起做某事，例如 Let's begin!（我們開始吧！）。

reading.title_en: A Math Class with Mr. Lin

sentences.en: It is morning, and Mr. Lin walks into the classroom.
sentences.zh: 現在是早上，林老師走進教室。

sentences.en: "Good morning! Open your book and let's begin," he says.
sentences.zh: 「早安！打開你的書，我們開始吧。」他說。

sentences.en: "Don't forget your pencil, and don't copy your friend's answer."
sentences.zh: 「不要忘記你的鉛筆，也不要抄朋友的答案。」

sentences.en: The math problem is difficult, but Mia is ready and wants to try.
sentences.zh: 這道數學題很難，但是米亞準備好了，而且想要試試看。

sentences.en: Leo forgets the answer, so he asks Mr. Lin for help.
sentences.zh: 里歐忘記了答案，所以他向林老師尋求幫助。

sentences.en: "Don't worry. Think again and check your answer," the teacher says.
sentences.zh: 「別擔心。再想一次並檢查你的答案。」老師說。

sentences.en: Now Leo understands, and his answer is correct, not wrong.
sentences.zh: 現在里歐懂了，他的答案是正確的，不是錯的。

sentences.en: "Excellent! Let's check the answer together and finish the lesson," Mr. Lin says.
sentences.zh: 「太棒了！我們一起檢查答案並結束這堂課吧。」林老師說。

sentences.en: "Please don't cheat, and always remember: a mistake is OK."
sentences.zh: 「請不要作弊，並且永遠記得：犯錯沒關係。」

sentences.en: The students smile, because Mr. Lin is helpful and his class is fun.
sentences.zh: 學生們微笑了，因為林老師很樂於助人，他的課很有趣。

questions.q: What does Mr. Lin tell the students to do at the beginning of class?
Why does Leo ask Mr. Lin for help?
Is Leo's answer correct or wrong in the end?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 祈使句：叫別人做 / 不要做某事
grammar_points.explain_zh: 祈使句用來下指令或請求。它不需要主詞，句子直接用「動詞原形」開頭。要叫別人「不要」做某事時，前面加 Don't。語氣客氣一點可以加 please。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② Let's…：我們一起做吧
grammar_points.explain_zh: Let's 是 Let us 的縮寫，後面接動詞原形，用來邀請大家「一起」做某事。語氣親切，常用在課堂或玩遊戲時。

examples.en: Let's begin!
Let's check the answer together.
Let's join the game!

lines.en: Good morning! Open your book. Let's begin.
lines.zh: 早安！打開你的書。我們開始吧。

lines.en: Excuse me. I forget my book today.
lines.zh: 對不起。我今天忘記帶我的書。

lines.en: It is OK. You can borrow Mia's book. Don't worry.
lines.zh: 沒關係。你可以借米亞的書。別擔心。

lines.en: Here you are. Let's check the answer together.
lines.zh: 拿去吧。我們一起檢查答案。

lines.en: Excellent! Repeat after me, please.
lines.zh: 太棒了！請跟著我重複。

sentences.en: Open your book and begin.
sentences.zh: 打開你的書，然後開始。

sentences.en: Please check your answer.
sentences.zh: 請檢查你的答案。

sentences.en: Don't cheat in the test.
sentences.zh: 考試時不要作弊。

sentences.en: Repeat after me, please.
sentences.zh: 請跟著我重複。

sentences.en: Let's join the game together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起參加遊戲吧。

sentences.en: Don't forget to ask for help.
sentences.zh: 不要忘記尋求幫助。

sentences.en: Are you ready? Let's begin!
sentences.zh: 你準備好了嗎？我們開始吧！

sentences.en: Your answer is correct. Excellent!
sentences.zh: 你的答案是正確的。太棒了！

練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格
練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: Can I ____ your pencil? I forget mine.

grammar: Where is…? 介系詞 in / on / under / near / behind
intro_zh: 這一課我們走進「家」裡，認識房子的各個房間和常見的家具、家電。最重要的是學會用「Where is…?」問東西在哪裡，並用 in / on / under / near / behind 這些「介系詞」說清楚位置。學會這一課，你就能帶朋友參觀你的家，還能告訴別人東西放在哪裡！
can_do: 能說出家裡各個房間的名稱（bedroom、kitchen、bathroom…）。
能用 Where is…? 問某樣東西在哪裡。
能用 in / on / under / near / behind 說出東西的位置。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Leo. This is my house. Come in!
sentences.zh: 嗨！我是 Leo。這是我的家。進來吧！

sentences.en: We have a big living room. The television and the sofa are here.
sentences.zh: 我們有一間大客廳。電視和沙發都在這裡。

sentences.en: The kitchen is near the dining room. The refrigerator is in the kitchen.
sentences.zh: 廚房在飯廳附近。冰箱在廚房裡。

sentences.en: "Where is your bedroom?" my friend Emma asks.
sentences.zh: 「你的臥房在哪裡？」我的朋友 Emma 問。

sentences.en: "It is here," I say. "My bed is near the window."
sentences.zh: 「在這裡，」我說。「我的床在窗戶附近。」

sentences.en: The lamp is on the desk, and my computer is on the desk, too.
sentences.zh: 檯燈在書桌上，我的電腦也在書桌上。

sentences.en: "Where is your cat?" Emma asks. "It is under the bed!"
sentences.zh: 「你的貓在哪裡？」Emma 問。「牠在床下面！」

sentences.en: The bathroom is there, behind the door. A clean towel is on the wall.
sentences.zh: 浴室在那裡，在門後面。一條乾淨的毛巾在牆上。

sentences.en: "I like your house, Leo!" Emma says with a big smile.
sentences.zh: 「我喜歡你的家，Leo！」Emma 帶著大大的微笑說。

questions.q: Where is the refrigerator?
Where is the cat?
What is on the desk?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 用 Where is…? 問位置，用介系詞回答
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想知道東西在哪裡，就用「Where is + 主詞 + ?」。回答時用「It is + 介系詞 + 地點」。常用的位置介系詞有 in（在裡面）、on（在上面）、under（在下方）、near（在附近）、behind（在後面）。
table: The cat is in the box.
The lamp is on the desk.
The ball is under the bed.
The chair is near the door.
The fan is behind the sofa.

grammar_points.title_zh: ② here 與 there（這裡 / 那裡）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 指近的地方用 here（這裡），指遠的地方用 there（那裡）。回答 Where is…? 時也可以簡單說 It is here. 或 It is there.。

examples.en: Where is the cat? It is here.
The kitchen is there, near the dining room.
examples.zh: 廚房在那裡，在飯廳附近。

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：在我家找書桌

lines.en: This is my house. Come in!
lines.zh: 這是我的家。進來吧！

lines.en: Wow, your living room is big! Where is your room?
lines.zh: 哇，你的客廳好大！你的房間在哪裡？

lines.en: It is here. My desk is near the window.
lines.zh: 在這裡。我的書桌在窗戶附近。

lines.en: Where is your computer?
lines.zh: 你的電腦在哪裡？

lines.en: It is on the desk. The lamp is on the desk, too.
lines.zh: 在書桌上。檯燈也在書桌上。

sentences.en: Welcome to my house!
sentences.zh: 歡迎來我家！

sentences.en: The television is in the living room.
sentences.zh: 電視在客廳裡。

sentences.en: Where is the towel? It is in the bathroom.
sentences.zh: 毛巾在哪裡？它在浴室裡。

sentences.en: The lamp is on the table.
sentences.zh: 檯燈在桌子上。

sentences.en: The cat is under the bed.
sentences.zh: 貓在床下面。

sentences.en: The refrigerator is in the kitchen, near the door.
sentences.zh: 冰箱在廚房裡，在門附近。

sentences.en: The fan is behind the sofa.
sentences.zh: 電風扇在沙發後面。

sentences.en: My piano is here, and my computer is there.
sentences.zh: 我的鋼琴在這裡，我的電腦在那裡。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的介系詞填入空格

items.q: The lamp is ____ the desk. (檯燈在書桌上面)
The cat is ____ the bed. (貓在床下面)
The towel is ____ the bathroom. (毛巾在浴室裡面)
The chair is ____ the door. (椅子在門附近)
The fan is ____ the sofa. (電風扇在沙發後面)
The television is ____ the living room. (電視在客廳裡面)

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: ____ is the computer? It is on the desk.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: cat / The / is / the / under / bed / .
items.ans: The cat is under the bed.

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: The lamp is on the desk.
The cat is under the bed.
The refrigerator is in the kitchen.

grammar: What time is it? What day is it? on Monday / at 7:00
intro_zh: 第十二課我們學會看時鐘說時間、講星期幾、報出十二個月份。學會問「現在幾點？」「今天星期幾？」，你就能安排自己的一天和一個星期，再也不會遲到囉！
can_do: 能用 What time is it? 問時間，並用 o'clock 回答。
能說出一週七天和一年十二個月。
能用 on Monday（在星期一）和 at 7:00（在七點）說出時間。

sentences.en: Emma always gets up early in the morning.
sentences.zh: 艾瑪總是早上很早起床。

sentences.en: "What time is it now?" she asks her mom.
sentences.zh: 「現在幾點？」她問媽媽。

sentences.en: Her mom looks at the clock and says, "It is seven o'clock."
sentences.zh: 媽媽看著時鐘說：「現在七點鐘。」

sentences.en: "What day is it today?" Emma asks.
sentences.zh: 「今天星期幾？」艾瑪問。

sentences.en: "It is Monday, so you have school in the morning," says her mom.
sentences.zh: 「今天星期一，所以你早上要上學。」媽媽說。

sentences.en: Emma has a test on Tuesday and a music class on Thursday.
sentences.zh: 艾瑪星期二有考試，星期四有音樂課。

sentences.en: On Friday night she often watches a movie with Leo.
sentences.zh: 星期五晚上她常常和里歐一起看電影。

sentences.en: Her birthday is in May, and the big party is on the weekend.
sentences.zh: 她的生日在五月，大派對在週末舉行。

sentences.en: Emma loves the weekend because she can play and sleep late.
sentences.zh: 艾瑪喜歡週末，因為她可以玩耍又睡到很晚。

sentences.en: "See you tomorrow at noon!" she says to Leo before she goes to bed.
sentences.zh: 「明天中午見！」她睡覺前對里歐說。

questions.q: What time does Emma get up?
What day does Emma have a test?
In which month is Emma's birthday?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 問時間與星期：What time is it? / What day is it?
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問現在幾點用 What time is it?，回答用「It is + 數字 + o'clock.」。問今天星期幾用 What day is it?，回答用「It is + 星期.」。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 介系詞：on + 星期，at + 時間
grammar_points.explain_zh: 說在哪一天用 on（on Monday 在星期一）；說在幾點用 at（at 7:00 在七點）。早上、下午、晚上用 in（in the morning）。

examples.en: I have school on Monday.
We play on the weekend.
I get up at 7:00 in the morning.
We eat dinner at six o'clock.

lines.en: Leo, what time is it now?
lines.zh: 里歐，現在幾點？

lines.en: It is eight o'clock. We are late!
lines.zh: 八點了。我們遲到了！

lines.en: Oh no! What day is it today?
lines.zh: 糟糕！今天星期幾？

lines.en: It is Monday. We have school in the morning.
lines.zh: 今天星期一。我們早上要上學。

lines.en: Let's go now! See you after school.
lines.zh: 我們現在走吧！放學後見。

sentences.en: What time is it? It is nine o'clock.
sentences.zh: 現在幾點？現在九點鐘。

sentences.en: A day has twenty-four hours.
sentences.zh: 一天有二十四個小時。

sentences.en: What day is it today? It is Friday.
sentences.zh: 今天星期幾？今天星期五。

sentences.en: I am happy on the weekend.
sentences.zh: 我週末很開心。

sentences.en: We have a test on Tuesday.
sentences.zh: 我們星期二有考試。

sentences.en: My birthday is in May.
sentences.zh: 我的生日在五月。

sentences.en: I get up early in the morning.
sentences.zh: 我早上很早起床。

sentences.en: See you tomorrow at noon!
sentences.zh: 明天中午見！

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: What ____ is it? It is ten o'clock.
What day is it? It is ____.
I get up early in the ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: The first month of the year is ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: I have a test on Friday.

grammar: What's the weather like? It's sunny.
intro_zh: 這一課我們學會用英語聊天氣、說季節，還會認識大自然裡的山、海、河流和花草。最重要的是學會問「What's the weather like?」（天氣怎麼樣？），並用「It's sunny.」這類句子回答。以後出門前，你就能用英語報天氣了！
can_do: 能用 What's the weather like? 問今天的天氣。
能用 It's sunny / rainy / windy / cloudy. 回答天氣。
能說出四個季節，並認識山、海、河、花等大自然單字。

reading.title_en: A Trip Through the Four Seasons

sentences.en: In spring, Emma and Leo go to a hill near a river.
sentences.zh: 春天時，艾瑪和里歐到一條河流旁的小山丘。

sentences.en: "What's the weather like?" asks Leo. "It's rainy and cool," says Emma.
sentences.zh: 「天氣怎麼樣？」里歐問。「天氣多雨又涼爽。」艾瑪說。

sentences.en: The grass is green and a rose grows by the lake.
sentences.zh: 草地是綠的，湖邊還長著一朵玫瑰。

sentences.en: In summer, the weather is sunny and warm, so they swim in the sea at the beach.
sentences.zh: 夏天天氣晴朗又溫暖，所以他們在海灘的海裡游泳。

sentences.en: The sun is bright and the sky is clear, but the hot sand can burn their feet.
sentences.zh: 太陽很亮，天空很晴朗，但是燙燙的沙子會燙到他們的腳。

sentences.en: In autumn, the wind is dry and a little cold, and they walk in the forest on the mountain.
sentences.zh: 秋天的風又乾又有點冷，他們在山上的森林裡散步。

sentences.en: After the rain, a rainbow shines in the sky above the trees.
sentences.zh: 雨後，一道彩虹在樹林上方的天空裡閃耀。

sentences.en: In winter, it is cloudy and snowy, so they take an umbrella and watch the snow.
sentences.zh: 冬天天氣陰陰的又下雪，所以他們帶著雨傘看雪。

sentences.en: "The seasons change, but nature is always beautiful," says Emma with a smile.
sentences.zh: 「季節會改變，但是大自然總是很美。」艾瑪笑著說。

questions.q: What's the weather like in summer?
Where do Emma and Leo walk in autumn?
questions.ans: In the forest on the mountain.

questions.q: What do they see in the sky after the rain?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 問天氣與回答：What's the weather like? — It's ___.
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問天氣最常用 What's the weather like?（天氣怎麼樣？）。回答時用 It's 加上一個天氣形容詞，這裡的 It 代表「天氣」，不用特別翻出來。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 名詞變形容詞：rain → rainy
grammar_points.explain_zh: 有些天氣名詞加上 -y 就變成形容詞，用來描述天氣。注意 sun → sunny、wind → windy 要把字尾的子音多寫一個。

examples.en: rain → It's rainy. (有雨 → 下雨的)
sun → It's sunny. (太陽 → 晴天的)
examples.zh: 太陽 → 天氣是晴朗的。

examples.en: wind → It's windy. (風 → 風大的)
cloud → It's cloudy. (雲 → 陰天的)
snow → It's snowy. (雪 → 下雪的)

lines.en: What's the weather like today?
lines.zh: 今天天氣怎麼樣？

lines.en: It's sunny and warm. The sky is bright and clear!
lines.zh: 是晴天又溫暖。天空很晴朗、很清澈！

lines.en: Let's go to the beach. Look, a rainbow in the sky!
lines.zh: 我們去海灘吧。看，天空有一道彩虹！

lines.en: Wow! But the wind can blow. Take an umbrella.
lines.zh: 哇！不過風會吹起來，帶把雨傘吧。

lines.en: OK! The sea and the sand are so beautiful.
lines.zh: 好！海洋和沙子好美喔。

sentences.en: What's the weather like? It's sunny today.
sentences.zh: 天氣怎麼樣？今天是晴天。

sentences.en: In spring, it is warm and rainy.
sentences.zh: 春天溫暖又多雨。

sentences.en: In summer, the sun is hot and bright.
sentences.zh: 夏天太陽又熱又亮。

sentences.en: In autumn, the wind is cool and dry.
sentences.zh: 秋天的風涼爽又乾燥。

sentences.en: In winter, it is cold and snowy.
sentences.zh: 冬天又冷又會下雪。

sentences.en: The mountain, the river, and the lake are in the forest.
sentences.zh: 山、河流和湖都在森林裡。

sentences.en: Look! A rainbow is in the clear sky.
sentences.zh: 看！晴朗的天空有一道彩虹。

sentences.en: A typhoon brings rain and strong wind.
sentences.zh: 颱風帶來雨和強風。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: The sun is hot. It can ____.
In winter, it is cold and ____.
Take an ____ on a rainy day.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: Which one is a season? (哪個是季節？)
Fire and the sun bring ____. (熱氣)
Wet is the opposite of ____. (潮濕 的相反)

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: What's the weather like? It's sunny.
A rainbow is in the sky.
In winter, it is cold and snowy.

grammar: I'm wearing…；He has short hair.（形容詞描述外表）
intro_zh: 這一課我們學會用英語說出身上穿的衣物，並描述一個人的外表長相。學會 I'm wearing…（我正穿著…）就能說出此刻穿的衣服；學會 He has short hair.（他有短頭髮。）就能用形容詞描述別人的樣子。出門前、看照片、找朋友時都很好用！
can_do: 能用 I'm wearing… 說出自己正穿著哪些衣物。
能用 He / She has… 加上形容詞描述一個人的外表。
能說出常見衣物和外表形容詞（高、矮、瘦、胖、漂亮…）。

sentences.en: Today is picture day, so I am wearing my uniform and clean white shoes.
sentences.zh: 今天是拍照日，所以我正穿著制服和乾淨的白鞋子。

sentences.en: My friend Mia is wearing a pretty dress and a small hat.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友米亞正穿著一件漂亮的洋裝，戴著一頂小帽子。

sentences.en: She has long hair, and she looks very cute.
sentences.zh: 她有長頭髮，看起來很可愛。

sentences.en: Leo is wearing a blue shirt, a jacket, and new boots.
sentences.zh: 里歐正穿著一件藍色襯衫、一件外套和新靴子。

sentences.en: He has short hair and is tall and strong.
sentences.zh: 他有短頭髮，又高又強壯。

sentences.en: Our teacher is wearing glasses and a scarf because it is cold.
sentences.zh: 我們的老師戴著眼鏡和圍巾，因為天氣很冷。

sentences.en: She is kind and friendly, and we all like her.
sentences.zh: 她又親切又友善，我們都喜歡她。

sentences.en: I put my bag and backpack on a chair and stand with my class.
sentences.zh: 我把袋子和背包放在椅子上，然後和全班站在一起。

sentences.en: "Smile, everyone!" says the teacher, and we all look good.
sentences.zh: 「大家微笑！」老師說，我們看起來都很棒。

sentences.en: Picture day is fun, and now we have a nice photo.
sentences.zh: 拍照日很好玩，現在我們有一張很好看的照片。

questions.q: What is Mia wearing?
questions.ans: A pretty dress and a small hat.

questions.q: Does Leo have short hair or long hair?
Why is the teacher wearing a scarf?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① I'm wearing…（現在進行式：我正穿著…）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 要說「現在正穿著什麼」，用「主詞 + be 動詞 + wearing + 衣物」。be 動詞跟著主詞變：I 配 am、he / she 配 is、we / they 配 are。wear（穿）後面加 -ing 變成 wearing。
table: 我正穿著一件 T 恤。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② He has… + 形容詞（描述外表長相）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 描述一個人「有」什麼樣的外表，用「主詞 + has / have + 形容詞 + 名詞」，I / you / we / they 用 have，he / she 用 has。也可以用 be 動詞加形容詞直接說「他很高」He is tall.。

examples.en: He has short hair.
She has long hair.
My dad is tall and strong.
The baby is cute and healthy.
examples.zh: 那個寶寶又可愛又健康。

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：在公園找朋友

lines.en: Tom, where is your sister?
lines.zh: 湯姆，你妹妹在哪裡？

lines.en: She is wearing a pink dress and a hat.
lines.zh: 她正穿著一件粉紅色洋裝，戴著一頂帽子。

lines.en: Is she tall? Does she have long hair?
lines.zh: 她高嗎？她有長頭髮嗎？

lines.en: No, she is short. She has short hair. She is very cute.
lines.zh: 不，她很矮。她有短頭髮。她很可愛。

lines.en: I see her! She is so pretty!
lines.zh: 我看到她了！她好漂亮！

sentences.en: I am wearing a blue T-shirt and shorts.
sentences.zh: 我正穿著一件藍色 T 恤和短褲。

sentences.en: She is wearing a pretty dress today.
sentences.zh: 她今天正穿著一件漂亮的洋裝。

sentences.en: He has short hair. He is tall and strong.
sentences.zh: 他有短頭髮。他又高又強壯。

sentences.en: My new shoes and socks are nice.
sentences.zh: 我的新鞋子和襪子很好看。

sentences.en: It is cold. Put on your coat and scarf.
sentences.zh: 天氣很冷。穿上你的外套和圍巾。

sentences.en: My backpack has two big pockets.
sentences.zh: 我的背包有兩個大口袋。

sentences.en: Grandma is old, but she is healthy and kind.
sentences.zh: 奶奶老了，但她很健康又親切。

sentences.en: We wear our school uniform every day.
sentences.zh: 我們每天穿學校制服。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: It is cold. Put on your ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: We put on a ____ when it rains.
Grandpa is ____, but he is healthy.
She has long hair and is very ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.q: 我正穿著一件 T 恤。

items.ans: My grandma is old and kind.

grammar: How do you feel? I feel…because…
intro_zh: 第十五課我們學會用英語說出自己的「感覺」和「想法」。開心、難過、生氣、害怕都可以說出來，還能用 because（因為）說出原因。學會這一課，你就能跟朋友分享心情，也能關心別人「你還好嗎？」
can_do: 能用 How do you feel? 問別人的感覺，並回答 I feel…。
能用 because 說出感覺的原因，例如 I feel happy because it is fun.。
能說出 afraid、sad、angry、excited、proud 等情緒形容詞。

sentences.en: Today Leo and Mia go to the zoo with their class.
sentences.zh: 今天里歐和米雅跟同學一起去動物園。

sentences.en: "How do you feel?" Mia asks. "I feel excited because the zoo is fun!" says Leo.
sentences.zh: 「你覺得怎麼樣？」米雅問。「我很興奮，因為動物園很好玩！」里歐說。

sentences.en: But soon a big bear comes near, and Leo feels afraid.
sentences.zh: 但不久一隻大熊靠近，里歐覺得很害怕。

sentences.en: "Do not worry," says Mia. "I believe you are brave."
sentences.zh: 「別擔心，」米雅說。「我相信你很勇敢。」

sentences.en: Leo is tired and a little sad because he wants a rest.
sentences.zh: 里歐很累，也有點難過，因為他想要休息。

sentences.en: Then they see a funny monkey, and they cry with joy.
sentences.zh: 接著他們看見一隻有趣的猴子，他們高興得喊了出來。

sentences.en: "How do you feel now?" asks Leo. "I feel happy because today is fun," says Mia.
sentences.zh: 「你現在覺得怎麼樣？」里歐問。「我很快樂，因為今天很好玩，」米雅說。

sentences.en: Leo feels glad and lucky to have a good friend.
sentences.zh: 里歐覺得很開心，也很幸運能有一個好朋友。

sentences.en: "I am proud of our class. Cheer up, everyone!" says the teacher.
sentences.zh: 「我以我們班為傲。大家加油！」老師說。

sentences.en: On the bus home, Leo and Mia feel great and free.
sentences.zh: 在回家的公車上，里歐和米雅覺得很棒又自由。

questions.q: How does Leo feel when the bear comes near?
Why does Mia feel happy?
What animal makes them cry with joy?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① How do you feel? — I feel … because …
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問別人的感覺用 How do you feel?（你覺得怎麼樣？）。回答用 I feel + 情緒形容詞。想說「為什麼」就在後面加 because（因為）+ 一個原因。
table: I feel happy because it is fun.
我很快樂，因為它很好玩。
I feel sad because I am lonely.
我很難過，因為我很孤單。
I feel afraid because the dog is big.
我很害怕，因為那隻狗很大。
I feel tired because I need a rest.
我很累，因為我需要休息。
I feel excited because today is fun.
我很興奮，因為今天很好玩。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 用感覺動詞說想法 (feel / hope / worry / believe)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 除了 feel，我們也常用 hope（希望）、worry（擔心）、believe（相信）來說出心裡的想法。這些動詞後面可以接一個短句子。

examples.en: I hope you feel great today.
examples.zh: 我希望你今天覺得很棒。

examples.en: Do not worry. You are lucky!
I believe you can do it. Cheer up!

lines.en: Hi, Ben. How do you feel today?
lines.zh: 嗨，班。你今天覺得怎麼樣？

lines.en: I feel sad because I am lonely.
lines.zh: 我很難過，因為我很孤單。

lines.en: Do not worry. Let us play! It is fun.
lines.zh: 別擔心。我們來玩吧！很好玩的。

lines.en: Thank you, Mia. Now I feel happy and free!
lines.zh: 謝謝你，米雅。現在我覺得開心又自由！

lines.en: Great! I am proud of you. Cheer up!
lines.zh: 太好了！我以你為傲。加油！

sentences.en: How do you feel? I feel happy.
sentences.zh: 你覺得怎麼樣？我很快樂。

sentences.en: I feel sad because I am lonely.
sentences.zh: 我很難過，因為我很孤單。

sentences.en: She is angry because she is tired.
sentences.zh: 她很生氣，因為她很累。

sentences.en: I feel afraid, but I will try.
sentences.zh: 我很害怕，但我會試試看。

sentences.en: Do not worry. I believe you can do it.
sentences.zh: 別擔心。我相信你做得到。

sentences.en: I am so excited because today is fun!
sentences.zh: 我好興奮，因為今天很好玩！

sentences.en: I feel lucky and proud of my friends.
sentences.zh: 我覺得很幸運，也以我的朋友為傲。

sentences.en: I hope you feel great. Cheer up!
sentences.zh: 我希望你覺得很棒。加油！

練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: How do you ____? I feel happy.
I feel sad ____ I am lonely.
She is ____ because she is tired.
Do not ____. You can do it!
I am so ____ because today is fun!
I ____ you can do it. Cheer up!

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: I feel ____ because I have many friends.
Do not cry. I ____ you feel better.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: sad / I / lonely / feel / because / I / am / .
items.ans: I feel sad because I am lonely.

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.q: 我很快樂，因為今天很好玩。
items.ans: I feel happy because today is fun.
She is angry because she is tired.
Do not worry. I believe you.

grammar: I like + V-ing；favorite
intro_zh: 這一課我們聊「運動」和「嗜好」。你會學到用「I like + 動詞-ing」說出自己喜歡做的事，也會用「What's your favorite…?」問別人最愛什麼。學會以後，下課時間就能跟同學分享自己愛打什麼球、愛玩什麼遊戲了！
can_do: 能用 I like swimming. 說出自己喜歡的運動或嗜好。
能用 What's your favorite sport? 詢問別人最愛的運動。
能說出 baseball、basketball、music、art 等運動與嗜好相關單字。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Leo. After school, my friends and I like playing sports.
sentences.zh: 嘿！我是里歐。放學後，我和我的朋友喜歡玩運動。

sentences.en: My favorite sport is baseball, and I am a good player.
sentences.zh: 我最愛的運動是棒球，而且我是個很棒的運動員。

sentences.en: My friend Mia likes playing basketball with her team.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友米亞喜歡和她的隊一起打籃球。

sentences.en: Ben likes swimming, and Anna likes jogging in the park.
sentences.zh: 班喜歡游泳，安娜喜歡在公園裡慢跑。

sentences.en: Lily is interested in art, so she likes drawing comics.
sentences.zh: 莉莉對藝術感興趣，所以她喜歡畫漫畫。

sentences.en: Tom likes singing songs in the band because music is fun.
sentences.zh: 湯姆喜歡在樂隊裡唱歌，因為音樂很有趣。

sentences.en: On Sunday, we like flying a kite and having a picnic.
sentences.zh: 星期天，我們喜歡放風箏和野餐。

sentences.en: We watch a baseball game, and it is very exciting!
sentences.zh: 我們看一場棒球比賽，真是非常刺激！

sentences.en: Sometimes my team can win, and sometimes we lose.
sentences.zh: 有時候我的隊可以贏，有時候我們會輸。

sentences.en: What is your favorite hobby?
sentences.zh: 你最愛的嗜好是什麼呢？

questions.q: What is Leo's favorite sport?
Who likes drawing comics?
What do they do on Sunday?
questions.ans: They fly a kite and have a picnic.

grammar_points.title_zh: ① I like + 動詞-ing（我喜歡做某事）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 要說「我喜歡做某件事」，用「I like」再加上「動詞-ing」。動詞字尾加 -ing 變成動名詞，表示「正在做的那件事」。注意：swim、jog 這種「短母音+子音」的字，字尾子音要重複再加 -ing。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② What's your favorite…?（你最愛的…是什麼？）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想問別人「最愛的」是什麼，用 What's your favorite + 名詞 +?。What's 是 What is 的縮寫。回答時用 My favorite + 名詞 + is …。

examples.en: A: What's your favorite sport? B: My favorite sport is tennis.
examples.zh: A：你最愛的運動是什麼？ B：我最愛的運動是網球。

examples.en: A: What's your favorite hobby? B: My favorite hobby is drawing.
examples.zh: A：你最愛的嗜好是什麼？ B：我最愛的嗜好是畫圖。

lines.en: What's your favorite sport, Mia?
lines.zh: 米亞，你最愛的運動是什麼？

lines.en: I like playing basketball. It is exciting!
lines.zh: 我喜歡打籃球。很刺激！

lines.en: Cool! I like swimming and jogging.
lines.zh: 酷！我喜歡游泳和慢跑。

lines.en: Do you like baseball, too?
lines.zh: 你也喜歡棒球嗎？

lines.en: Yes! My team can win the game.
lines.zh: 喜歡！我們隊可以贏得比賽。

sentences.en: I like playing baseball after school.
sentences.zh: 放學後我喜歡打棒球。

sentences.en: What's your favorite sport?
sentences.zh: 你最愛的運動是什麼？

sentences.en: My favorite hobby is drawing pictures.
sentences.zh: 我最愛的嗜好是畫圖。

sentences.en: She likes singing songs in the band.
sentences.zh: 她喜歡在樂隊裡唱歌。

sentences.en: We like swimming and jogging every day.
sentences.zh: 我們每天喜歡游泳和慢跑。

sentences.en: The basketball game is very exciting!
sentences.zh: 這場籃球比賽非常刺激！

sentences.en: I am interested in art and music.
sentences.zh: 我對藝術和音樂感興趣。

sentences.en: Our team can win, but they can lose.
sentences.zh: 我們隊可以贏，但他們可能會輸。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的動詞-ing 填入空格
練習三：選出正確的字
練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

grammar: can / can't；動作動詞與方向
intro_zh: 這一課我們學會說自己「會」和「不會」做的事，例如跳、爬、踢、溜冰。我們也會用動作動詞和方向字（上下左右、東西南北、進出）來說明怎麼移動。學會這一課，你就能介紹自己的本領，也能教別人怎麼走！
can_do: 能用 can 說出自己會做的事，用 can't 說出不會做的事。
能用 Can you…? 提問，並用 Yes, I can. / No, I can't. 回答。
能用動作動詞和方向字（up / down / left / right / into / over）說明動作與方向。

sentences.en: Today is Sports Day, and Leo and Mia come to the park.
sentences.zh: 今天是運動會，里歐和米亞來到公園。

sentences.en: Leo can run fast, and he can jump high over the low box.
sentences.zh: 里歐能跑得很快，他也能跳過那個矮盒子。

sentences.en: Mia can climb up the wall, but she can't skate.
sentences.zh: 米亞能爬上那道牆，但她不會溜冰。

sentences.en: "Can you kick the ball into the net?" Leo asks.
sentences.zh: 「你能把球踢進網裡嗎？」里歐問。

sentences.en: "Yes, I can! But you can't catch me," Mia says.
sentences.zh: 「可以，我能！但你抓不到我，」米亞說。

sentences.en: They follow the path and go left to the big tree.
sentences.zh: 他們沿著小路走，向左走到那棵大樹。

sentences.en: Mia is quick, so she can hide behind the tree.
sentences.zh: 米亞很快，所以她能躲在樹後面。

sentences.en: Leo can't find her, but he doesn't stop.
sentences.zh: 里歐找不到她，但他沒有停下來。

sentences.en: "Hurry up! Cross the field and bring the flag back!" the teacher calls.
sentences.zh: 「快點！穿越操場，把旗子帶回來！」老師喊著。

sentences.en: Leo and Mia can win together, because they practice every day.
sentences.zh: 里歐和米亞能一起獲勝，因為他們每天都練習。

questions.q: What can Leo do?
questions.ans: He can run fast and jump high.

questions.q: Can Mia skate?
Where does Mia hide?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① can / can't ＋ 動詞（會／不會做某事）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 要說「我會做某事」，用「主詞 ＋ can ＋ 原形動詞」；要說「不會」，把 can 改成 can't（cannot 的縮寫）。can 後面的動詞永遠用原形，不加 s。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 提問與方向字（Can you…? 和方向）
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問別人會不會用「Can you ＋ 動詞…?」，回答用 Yes, I can. 或 No, I can't.。方向字告訴我們往哪裡動：up 往上、down 往下、left 左邊、right 右邊、into 進入、over 越過。

examples.en: Can you jump high? — Yes, I can.
examples.zh: 你能跳得很高嗎？——是的，我能。

examples.en: Can you skate? — No, I can't.
Go up, then turn left.
Jump over the box and go out.

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：在公園比本領

lines.en: Can you climb that high wall, Mia?
lines.zh: 米亞，你能爬那道高牆嗎？

lines.en: Yes, I can! But I can't skate. Can you?
lines.zh: 可以，我能！但我不會溜冰。你會嗎？

lines.en: I can skate, and I can jump over the low box.
lines.zh: 我會溜冰，我也能跳過那個矮盒子。

lines.en: Wow! Let's practice together. Follow me!
lines.zh: 哇！我們一起練習吧。跟我來！

lines.en: OK, hurry up! Go left and climb up.
lines.zh: 好，快點！往左走然後往上爬。

sentences.en: I can jump, but I can't climb high.
sentences.zh: 我會跳，但我不能爬很高。

sentences.en: Can you kick the ball? Yes, I can.
sentences.zh: 你能踢球嗎？是的，我能。

sentences.en: She can skate, and she can stand on one foot.
sentences.zh: 她會溜冰，她也能單腳站立。

sentences.en: We practice every day, so we are quick.
sentences.zh: 我們每天練習，所以我們很快。

sentences.en: Go up the stairs and turn right.
sentences.zh: 走上樓梯然後右轉。

sentences.en: Pull the door, don't push it.
sentences.zh: 拉這扇門，不要推它。

sentences.en: Hurry up! Cross the road and follow me.
sentences.zh: 快點！穿越馬路然後跟著我。

sentences.en: Put the ball into the box, please.
sentences.zh: 請把球放進盒子裡。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: I ____ skate, but my brother can't.
Can you kick the ball? Yes, I ____.
He can't swim. He ____ stand here.
Go ____ the stairs to the top.
Jump ____ the box, don't hit it.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: We can't go now. We ___ wait.
Hurry up! We must ___ the road.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: the / Follow / me / and / hurry / up / .

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: I can jump, but I can't skate.
Put the ball into the box, please.

grammar: What does he do? present simple 第三人稱；want to be…
intro_zh: 第十八課我們認識各種職業與人物，學會用英語介紹別人「在做什麼工作」，並說出自己「將來想當什麼」。學會這一課，你就能聊聊爸爸媽媽的工作，也能說出自己的夢想職業！
can_do: 能說出常見職業的英語單字（doctor、nurse、driver…）。
能用 What does he do? 問別人的工作，並用 He works… 回答。
能用 I want to be a… 說出自己想當什麼。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Mia. I want to tell you about my family's jobs.
sentences.zh: 嗨！我是米亞。我想跟你說說我家人的工作。

sentences.en: What does my father do? He is a police officer.
sentences.zh: 我爸爸做什麼工作？他是警察。

sentences.en: He is brave and honest, and he works very hard every day.
sentences.zh: 他勇敢又誠實，而且每天都工作得很努力。

sentences.en: My mother is a nurse. She is busy, but she is kind and wise.
sentences.zh: 我媽媽是護士。她很忙，但她善良又有智慧。

sentences.en: My big brother is a singer. He is famous and popular.
sentences.zh: 我哥哥是歌手。他既有名又受歡迎。

sentences.en: What does my uncle do? He is a successful businessman.
sentences.zh: 我叔叔做什麼工作？他是個成功的商人。

sentences.en: He has many good ideas, and his business is very big.
sentences.zh: 他有很多好主意，他的生意做得很大。

sentences.en: My grandfather is a farmer. He is poor but happy and serious about his work.
sentences.zh: 我爺爺是農夫。他雖然不富有，但很快樂，也很認真看待他的工作。

sentences.en: What do I want to be? I want to be a doctor!
sentences.zh: 我想當什麼呢？我想當醫生！

sentences.en: I think it is a great job, and I will work hard to make my plan come true.
sentences.zh: 我覺得那是很棒的工作，我會努力讓我的計畫實現。

questions.q: What does Mia's father do?
Is Mia's mother a singer or a nurse?
What does Mia want to be?
questions.ans: She wants to be a doctor.

grammar_points.title_zh: ① 問職業：What does he/she do? + He/She works…
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問別人做什麼工作用 What does he do?（他是做什麼的？）。回答時主詞是 he / she，動詞要加 -s：He works.（他工作。）也可以直接說 He is a doctor.（他是醫生。）

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 說夢想：I want to be a…
grammar_points.explain_zh: 說自己將來想當什麼工作，用 I want to be a + 職業。職業前面通常要加 a（若以母音開頭則用 an）。

examples.en: I want to be a doctor.
I want to be a singer.
I want to be a famous writer.

dialogue.title_zh: 情境對話：你的爸爸做什麼工作？

lines.en: Leo, what does your father do?
lines.zh: 里歐，你爸爸做什麼工作？

lines.en: He is a fireman. He is very busy and brave.
lines.zh: 他是消防員。他很忙也很勇敢。

lines.en: Wow! My mother is a nurse. She is hard-working.
lines.zh: 哇！我媽媽是護士。她很勤勉。

lines.en: That is great. What do you want to be?
lines.zh: 那很棒。你想當什麼呢？

lines.en: I want to be a doctor. It is a good job.
lines.zh: 我想當醫生。那是個好工作。

sentences.en: My father is a driver. He works hard.
sentences.zh: 我爸爸是司機。他工作很努力。

sentences.en: What does she do? She is a doctor.
sentences.zh: 她做什麼工作？她是醫生。

sentences.en: The waiter and the waitress are busy.
sentences.zh: 男服務生和女服務生都很忙。

sentences.en: The king is rich. The farmer is poor.
sentences.zh: 國王很有錢。農夫很貧窮。

sentences.en: A good leader is smart and honest.
sentences.zh: 好的領導人聰明又誠實。

sentences.en: The singer is famous and popular.
sentences.zh: 那位歌手有名又受歡迎。

sentences.en: I want to be a writer. It is my plan.
sentences.zh: 我想當作家。這是我的計畫。

sentences.en: He is a successful businessman with many ideas.
sentences.zh: 他是個成功的商人，有很多主意。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: What does he ____? He is a doctor.
She is a ____ in the hospital.
What ____ she do? She is a teacher.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: A person who drives a car is a ____.
A person who brings letters is a ____.
A person who has a lot of money is ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: to / I / be / want / singer / a / .
items.ans: I want to be a singer.

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.q: 他做什麼工作？他是農夫。
items.ans: What does he do? He is a farmer.
I want to be a doctor.

grammar: Is there a…? go to the…；Where do you live?
intro_zh: 第十九課我們學會介紹自己的城鎮與國家，認識城市裡常見的地方（公園、郵局、醫院、便利商店…）。我們也學會用「Is there a…?」問某個地方有沒有，用「go to the…」說去哪裡，並用「Where do you live?」問別人住在哪裡。學會這一課，你就能介紹自己住的地方了！
can_do: 能說出城市裡常見的地方，例如 park、post office、hospital、convenient store。
能用 Is there a…? 問某個地方有沒有，並用 go to the… 說要去哪裡。
能用 Where do you live? 問別人住哪裡，並回答自己住在哪個城市。

sentences.en: Hi! I am Leo. I live in Beitou, a town in Taipei.
sentences.zh: 嗨！我是里歐。我住在北投，台北的一個市鎮。

sentences.en: My town is in Taiwan, and Taiwan is a small country.
sentences.zh: 我的市鎮在台灣，而台灣是一個小國家。

sentences.en: There is a park near my street, and there is a library next to the bank.
sentences.zh: 我的街道附近有一座公園，而圖書館就在銀行旁邊。

sentences.en: On Monday I go to the library to read books.
sentences.zh: 星期一我去圖書館看書。

sentences.en: After school, my friends and I go to the park on every block.
sentences.zh: 放學後，我和朋友去每個街區的公園。

sentences.en: "Is there a zoo in your town?" my friend Mia asks.
sentences.zh: 「你的市鎮裡有動物園嗎？」我的朋友米亞問。

sentences.en: "No, there isn't, but there is a museum and a post office," I say.
sentences.zh: 「沒有，但有一座博物館和一間郵局，」我說。

sentences.en: We also go to the market and the bakery to buy bread.
sentences.zh: 我們也去市場和麵包店買麵包。

sentences.en: "Where do you live?" I ask Mia. "I live in Kaohsiung," she says.
sentences.zh: 「你住哪裡？」我問米亞。「我住在高雄，」她說。

sentences.en: I love my town, my city, and my country!
sentences.zh: 我愛我的市鎮、我的城市，還有我的國家！

questions.q: Where does Leo live?
Is there a zoo in Leo's town?
Where does Mia live?

grammar_points.title_zh: ① Is there a…? 這裡有……嗎？
grammar_points.explain_zh: 想問某個地方「有沒有」某樣東西，用 Is there a + 地方?。回答肯定用 Yes, there is.；回答否定用 No, there isn't.。

grammar_points.title_zh: ② go to the… 去……；Where do you live? 你住哪裡？
grammar_points.explain_zh: 說要去某個地方用 go to the + 地方，例如 go to the park（去公園）。想問別人住在哪裡用 Where do you live?，回答用 I live in + 城市，例如 I live in Taipei.（我住在台北。）

examples.en: I go to the library on Monday.
We go to the park after school.
Where do you live? — I live in Beitou.
She lives in New Taipei.

lines.en: Where do you live, Ben?
lines.zh: 你住哪裡，班？

lines.en: I live in Beitou, in New Taipei. Where do you live?
lines.zh: 我住在新北的北投。你住哪裡？

lines.en: I live in Taipei. Is there a zoo near your town?
lines.zh: 我住在台北。你的城鎮附近有動物園嗎？

lines.en: No, there isn't. But there is a big park and a library.
lines.zh: 沒有。不過有一個大公園和一間圖書館。

lines.en: Nice! Let's go to the park this weekend.
lines.zh: 太好了！這個週末我們去公園吧。

sentences.en: I live in Taiwan. My city is Taipei.
sentences.zh: 我住在台灣。我的城市是台北。

sentences.en: Is there a post office on this street?
sentences.zh: 這條街上有郵局嗎？

sentences.en: Yes, there is. It is near the bank.
sentences.zh: 有。它在銀行附近。

sentences.en: We go to the supermarket and the bakery.
sentences.zh: 我們去超級市場和麵包店。

sentences.en: There is a convenient store on every block.
sentences.zh: 每個街區都有一間便利商店。

sentences.en: My town has a hospital, a park, and a library.
sentences.zh: 我的市鎮有醫院、公園和圖書館。

sentences.en: Where do you live? — I live in Kaohsiung.
sentences.zh: 你住哪裡？——我住在高雄。

sentences.en: Let's go to the museum and the zoo today.
sentences.zh: 我們今天去博物館和動物園吧。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: Is there ____ park near your town?
Is there a bank? Yes, there ____.
We go ____ the library after school.
Where do you ____? I live in Taipei.
Is there a zoo? No, there ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: I want to buy bread. I go to the ____.
I am sick. I go to the ____.
I want to read books. I go to the ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）
練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

grammar: How do you go…? by bus；past simple 初探
intro_zh: 最後一課我們去旅行！學會用「How do you go…?」問怎麼去一個地方，並用 by bus、by MRT 回答交通方式。我們也認識亞洲和世界各國，還有好玩的節慶。這一課第一次輕輕碰到「過去式」——說說我們去了哪裡、做了什麼（I went…、We had…）。
can_do: 能用 How do you go…? 問怎麼去某地，並用 by bus / by MRT 回答。
能說出多個國家的名字，並聊聊自己的旅行。
能用簡單的過去式 (I went…、We had…) 說說去過的地方和節慶。

sentences.en: Last winter my family had a big trip to Japan.
sentences.zh: 去年冬天我家有一趟很棒的日本旅行。

sentences.en: "How do you go to the airport?" Mom asked.
sentences.zh: 「你怎麼去機場？」媽媽問。

sentences.en: We went to the airport by MRT, and then we got on the airplane.
sentences.zh: 我們搭捷運去機場，然後上了飛機。

sentences.en: We had to wait, because the traffic to the airport was busy.
sentences.zh: 我們得等一下，因為去機場的車流很多。

sentences.en: In Japan we did not drive a car; we took a train and a bus every day.
sentences.zh: 在日本我們沒有開車，每天搭火車和公車。

sentences.en: One day we rode a boat under a big bridge to visit a small island.
sentences.zh: 有一天我們搭船穿過一座大橋，去拜訪一座小島。

sentences.en: People there celebrate festivals with food, lights, and music.
sentences.zh: 那裡的人用食物、燈光和音樂慶祝節慶。

sentences.en: My grandma gave me a gift and a red envelope for Chinese New Year.
sentences.zh: 奶奶給我一個禮物和一個紅包當農曆新年禮。

sentences.en: It was a great trip, and next year I want to fly to Korea!
sentences.zh: 這是一趟很棒的旅行，明年我想飛去韓國！

questions.q: Where did the family go on their trip?
How did they go to the airport?
What did Grandma give for Chinese New Year?
questions.ans: A gift and a red envelope.

grammar_points.title_zh: ① How do you go…? — 用 by + 交通工具回答
grammar_points.explain_zh: 問「你怎麼去…？」用 How do you go to + 地方?。回答時用 by + 交通工具（by bus、by MRT、by train…）。注意 by 後面的工具不加 a/the。
table: How do you go to school?
I go to school by bus.
How do you go to Taipei?
I go to Taipei by MRT.
How do you go to the station?
I go to the station by bike.
How do you go to Japan?
I go to Japan by airplane.
How do you go to the island?
I go to the island by ship.

grammar_points.title_zh: ② 輕輕認識過去式 (I went… / We had…)
grammar_points.explain_zh: 說「已經做過的事」要用過去式。常用的有 go → went（去了）、have → had（有了、度過）、see → saw（看見了）。只要先記住這幾個常用的就好。

examples.en: Last week I went to Japan by airplane.
examples.zh: 上週我搭飛機去了日本。

examples.en: We had a big trip in the summer.
examples.zh: 夏天我們有一趟很棒的旅行。

examples.en: On Christmas Day I saw Santa Claus.
examples.zh: 聖誕節那天我看見了聖誕老人。

lines.en: Hi, Tom! How do you go to the airport?
lines.zh: 嗨，湯姆！你怎麼去機場？

lines.en: I go by MRT. I will fly to Korea for Chinese New Year.
lines.zh: 我搭捷運去。農曆新年我要飛去韓國。

lines.en: Wow! Last year I went to Japan by airplane. We had a great trip.
lines.zh: 哇！去年我搭飛機去日本。我們有一趟很棒的旅行。

lines.en: Nice! Did you get a gift?
lines.zh: 真好！你有拿到禮物嗎？

lines.en: Yes! My family gave me a red envelope. Have a good trip!
lines.zh: 有！我家人給我一個紅包。祝你旅途愉快！

sentences.en: How do you go to school? — I go by bus.
sentences.zh: 你怎麼上學？——我搭公車。

sentences.en: We go to Taipei by MRT.
sentences.zh: 我們搭捷運去台北。

sentences.en: My dad can drive a car, and I can ride a bike.
sentences.zh: 我爸爸會開車，我會騎腳踏車。

sentences.en: Last summer we had a trip to Singapore.
sentences.zh: 去年夏天我們去新加坡旅行。

sentences.en: I went to Thailand by airplane.
sentences.zh: 我搭飛機去了泰國。

sentences.en: On the Moon Festival we eat moon cakes.
sentences.zh: 中秋節我們吃月餅。

sentences.en: We celebrate Christmas and get presents.
sentences.zh: 我們慶祝聖誕節，並收到禮物。

sentences.en: Wait! The train is at the station.
sentences.zh: 等一下！火車在車站。

exercises.title_zh: 練習一：單字配對（把英文和中文連起來）
練習二：選出正確的答案填入空格

items.q: We eat moon cakes on the ____ Festival.
On Chinese New Year I get a ____.

exercises.title_zh: 練習三：選出正確的字

items.q: Last week I ____ to Japan by airplane.
We ____ a great trip in the summer.
I can ____ a bike to the station.

exercises.title_zh: 練習四：句子重組（把單字排成正確的句子）

items.q: you / How / go / do / to / school / ?
items.ans: How do you go to school?

exercises.title_zh: 練習五：翻譯造句（把中文寫成英文）

items.ans: I go to Taipei by MRT.
Last year I went to Japan.
We eat moon cakes on the Moon Festival.
